member.name: T:GSTFlow.Rules.SqlInferenceOutcome
member.summary: Represents the execution outcome of an AI / Semantic Router SQL query over .cff Parquet files.

member.name: M:GSTFlow.Rules.SqlInference.routePromptToDuckDbSql(System.String)
member.summary: Deterministic air-gapped semantic router that translates natural language prompts into vectorized DuckDB Parquet SQL.

member.name: P:GSTFlow.Rules.SqlInference.duckDbCffGbnfGrammar
member.summary: The strict GBNF grammar constraining LLM outputs to valid DuckDB Parquet SELECT queries over .cff containers.
